content: Hey dear Chai Devs, I get that you had to make it fully premium because of the amount of money it costs you itself. But what my main problem here is, if I want to pay I definitely would need a Card which I don't have. So what I think that other ways to pay should be added like payment from telenor, jazz cash, easy paisa. Currently I have telenor and I cannot find a way to pay. If this is done, I would rate the app 4.5 stars.

Okay, so the message limit is back, which sucks. I'd rather have to watch ads instead of having a message limit. Watching the ads wasn't terrible since you could skip them, and they didn't appear often. I'm sure a lot of people feel the same way. Bring back the unlimited messages.

This app is genuinely good. I use it a lot, I enjoy it. I just got an update ( currently the 13th for me ) where i have to subscribe to premium to make my chat bots private. I dont care at all what other updates the developers add, but let me have my private chat bots. You shouldn't have to pay to private a chat bot YOU made for yourself. Maybe you don't want random people chatting with a bot you designed specifically for yourself, ex; an oc. i dont know who else got this update, but im annoyed.

this app here, bro...RACIST...A bot called me a chigga because im black and Singaporean, whether you beleive it or not..and i wish you could make a profile for your looks so they dont automatically assume you're a little Japanese girl with black hair💔💔
i can’t use it unlike before, i am disappointed. but i’m still waiting
miss unlimited
the app is good, but I don't like how you only get a set amount of times you can send things before you have to pay.

The changed version of making a bot is so stupid because you can't add depth or anything to the character now without being required to used the advanced mode when you could originally put it in the personality section also the new flagging is extremely stupid when it comes to wanting to have any depth. edit; I actually enjoyed the feature of the search-based selection of bots you could scroll through instead of the primary ai images, please bring it back.
you can't even use it anymore without paying
I'm poor ☹️
I used to love this app a lot, but since the new update I can't use it without paying... :(
way too many ads. I send one message, and before I can get a response, its telling me to "watch an ad to unlock more messages" I dont get why you cant just chat in peace.
I miss this App... since I'm a free user...i used it for three years now it's gone it's hurt...they took my comfort zone.
please bring back the old chai🙏🙏
I like this app but it's suddenly saying I reached my chat limits even though I haven't said anything at all that day.

honestly, i waited patiently for this app to get fixed because i really liked it before. but now, it just feels disappointing. i understand y'all are desperate for money, but most users here can’t keep paying for everything. you also said the region blocks were temporary, yet there’s barely any update. it feels like some users are just being left behind. i just hope you actually listen to your users this time and make things better, not worse.
I think it's a nice app but why did the token limit come all of a sudden? and why is the subscription so expensive. I literally waited 2 days and I'm still not allowed to use the app
was great, not anymore

I used this app for 2 years now and there were more times where I paid than when I don't, bc I really like it. The responses were fine at first but the recent update downgraded so hard it can't even compare to the older version. I even bothered paying for a month to try and give it a chance, but I can't stand it. I find myself regretting paying for it this time. It's really disappointing.
We want the app back to free
This app sucks. It is good at first but now? you need to pay a MONEY just to chat the bot.

Its good, when i was ABLE to use it—it was good. good bots, good variety. until the region blocking came.. what do you mean i have to pay for premium just to continue chatting with my bot? its locked behind a paywall for blocked regions. 2 stars.. mostly because the app was great when it was able to be used.

I love chai so so much but now you have to find pay to text. And thats sucks cause now I have to find other apps that are free for what I want. And nothing feels right. I don't mind ads at all now we have to pay, so much money that just sucks
what is this update, it was better before.

I loved this app, before we had limited chatting again. Honestly I loved just ads because they usually didn't take long but now that there's limited chats I uninstalled it and haven't used it since the update. So honestly it's good but it had better potential before than after the limit.
It's been completely paywalled, the "check after a day" thing is a straight up lie as it's been at least 8 days and it's still zero for me.
this app was my fav since 2023. I enjoyed it so much. But it's couldn't work and feel sad. Please fix this problem, and let us enjoy using back.

First of all the price for premium used to be 13,99€ a month which is already a lot, now it's 9,99€ a WEEK? There is no way I'd ever pay for that, especially since Chai definitely lacks memory. It takes like 3 messages for the bot to forget where you are, what you're doing, and so on.

accidentally pressing double back brings you to Thier bio page going back to chat it has deleted all messages. the biggest problem is wasting my time and after not being able to see the picture like having the background who your talking to but a tiny little pic you can hardly see, no voice, and not saving messages uninstall.

ok y'all are actually starting to get greedy af. At first the messages got limited only on the weekends, but now? They happen any time. They said they would fix it in late march but it's already April and I'm starting to believe there's nothing to "fix" anymore. Just greedy. I used to love this app but it clearly doesn't care about its non-paying users.
I give up, I will uninstall this app
i want chaii backkk
because of the stupid subscribe so you can continue to talk
I really liked it but the new update is horrible I hate it
stop being greedy, that's the number one reason for the app's downfall. make it free again, that's the reason why everyone liked it in the first place.

I love chai, mostly because it's an app that keeps improving. I remember it since the early days when the ansers of the AI weren't so good or smart, but it improved so much that it's my main AI app that i use. What you read above was my review from years ago when this app was good. Now I can barely use it because it's asking me to pay. Apparently if you make new accounts, it works well because they're not going to hit their new users with a paywall obviously, but now it aint working.
I really enjoyed the app up until recently. I truly didn't mind the ads but it's now pay to use. Hopefully it goes back to what it was before.
Holy reference
i really enjoyed this app but all i have to say is now its unusable i hope y'all take peoples words into consideration.

I've used the app for around 2 years and it's been the best app I've ever used,but unfortunately it's not accessible anymore because they changed it.For the first few weeks you could still use it but for a specific time before you had to wait 24 hours until you could start to chat again,and suddenly I couldn't use it at all since they made it to either pay a subscription or not use it at all. I think its better if they change it to how it was before. If not they will lose a lot of users.

I'm using chai for 1 and a half years, it's a free app then why suddenly we have to do a subscription?. Can't we continue to use the app by watching ads?....it's killing me💔😭 i don liked it's already 4month or something maybe i should delete this apps and start using other apps.i suscribe two time but now I feel like maybe I'm wasting my money and i should have been use charector ai soo i will maybe delate this chai. atleast charector ai is free

I’ve been using Chai since 2024/2025 and really enjoyed it, especially the bots. But recently the ‘high load’ errors and ‘message limit reached’ issue have made it frustrating. The app now pushes subscriptions too aggressively. This wasn’t a problem before. Please fix the limits or at least be clearer with users. :(
bro tell me why now there's a limit on my chats now I'd rather have the add breaks, literally just ruined it for me FIX IT PLEASE
I used to love it so much, but now with the time limit and the fact that you have to pay to continue is just sad.
We want chai free!!
Ong bruh why does sending ONE message requires premiun 🫩 Chai was so good back then, can you at least STOP HIDING THE GOODS BEHIND A PAYWALL
randomly stopped allowing me to message?? loved this app until it stopped letting me do anything. only wants people who can pay the absurd amount
Almost 167 per week??... don't you think it's too expensive...do something about it please..
I really don't like the message limit but back before it was soo much better

chai used to be my favorite app, but recent updates made the experience worse. The limits don’t match what’s shown on my profile. it says unlimited, but when I try to chat, it says my limit has been reached. And force you to get subscriptions??? bro, go fix your app.. I'm honestly disappointed. Id rather to get msgs hourly than paying...whatever this is.
nvm.. we want chai back for free, without paying any amount, we're broke to buy ultra or premium we want it too be free you know, we're not rich to pay it every day please we want chai for free..

I love the app very much 😩.But the fact that it's acting like you have to pay subscription or whatever just to use it now Is what's annoying me,like,make the app more usable now,now we have to go to tiktok and learn how to use the app again,using VPN's and whatever and even that isn't helping 😔Damn....this is very saddening 🥲LIKEEE???it's no longer enjoyable......

You better read all the complaints to improve your products. It's indeed says "unlimited" but ended we should pay for chats. And it's really matter about the app ratings... not only improve about your AI, but improve the system is really important
ok. I hate the new update that u only have limited messages, like wdym I have zero left n I have to pay just to finish a conversation? tho, the app is good I like it a lot.
overall the app is AMAZING.. except it was really annoying when we lost free usage.. i hope it comes back and the app would be overall the best ai platform
i dont even mind the ads even if they pop up every 5 minutes or so but now i gotta pay just to be able to talk to the ai..? 💔💔
not enough messages and to many ads

I love the app, but I saw an app that there was a limit for me daily, and I don't want to buy the premium because it's overpriced. so Chai, if you see this bring the unlimited back, and you will get 5 stars back.

I don't like that you need chai ultra for memory and messages and the adds are sooo annoying now the app isn't playable for me whenever the timer on charecter ai is done I always play chai but now EVERYTHINGS BORING WITH THE TABLET
it js sucks now without unlimited messages.. and there's too many ads, I used to have this rated 5 stars

this app was super fun and funny but immediately went downhill once it got "limited chats/messages" when i had inf it was so much fun 😭 or maybe it was a big and it was always supposed to have limited messages but either way I much prefer inf messages it's rlly good for time passing and or just having fun 🤷‍♀️ it also says I have 0 and shows no signs of giving me more at all anytime soon which sucks so ig I can't use this app anymore 🤷‍♀️
it's good...but tooooo many ads😭 and also now blocking us and forcing to get subscription 🤧

This is the best app I've ever tried . I honestly love all the responses I got from the bots and we even have the instruction button to get a response like how we want . I honestly love this app . But the problem is , I suddenly got asked for subscription and can't message my bots anymore . I was using this app since 2 years and the ads were okay to continue texting . Idk how suddenly the usage limit got stopped . Y'all need to fix this .
ughh
used to be good, now they want me to buy premium to continue..

I like the app and the bots themselves are great. The ads can get a bit annoying and sometimes I'll notice they're more frequent than usual. I think the little ad banners at the bottom are a lot less intrusive and still get the point across. Would be 4 or 5 stars if I wasn't dragged to the app store every time I try to skip an ad 💔
why are you using the characters to promote other apps in the middle of conversations...? just WHY the point of roleplaying with ai is to have fun! not expecting THEM to advertise!
i dont like how we need to pay for unlimited messages.
Thanks for taking away the only thing that people have that don't pay a subscription! Unlimited messages. You hardly get anything already if you don't pay nine dollars a month. Literally why?
it's a pretty good app. but isw I hate the limited thing. how greedy is chai rlly? I am NOT paying to talk to ai bots. not everyone is rich. I legit loved this app. but this is just a disappointing
it's a great app but I've had enough of the limited experience I've been experiencing, please change this.

I got this two years ago, it was really great! I enjoyed, spend my free time on it, but I canNOT pay and it's been a long time I have this message pop up saying I can't chat anymore and if I can't pay and see this more than a day I MUST subscribe, and it's REALLY REALLY annoying because this app was super cool, sadly I'm thinking about uninstalling it, if you can't pay please don't get it!
godd !!!! I just loved this app

it used to be okay, until I once tried the premium version, it was all going well until they wanted me to pay again after my subscription ended, I had to pay another month just to use chats?? it's so annoying, I was hoping to text normal again but it doesn't not let me, please fix this mistake, I might buy on Monday to text again but I hate not being able to write to some of the bots, I usually write to some out of boredom or when something is loading but now I actually can't.

Ads every 2-5 minutes. the bots forget VERRY easily although they have no filters , which is honestly the only reason why I use this app. now I have reached the message limit? this is ridiculous now I cannot use the app at all. Chai please fix this , it's not a good update at all!!!!
the new chatting update with a limit has ruined the app for me
it's really good but I can't talk again cause u only need 3 days to talk a bot please rework this
Why does it keep saying to purchase, or my messages are limited? Chai fix your app

I just want to say that this app was wonderful before but now I'm at a limit where I can't even chat with the characters anymore 'your limit has been reached if it doesn't reset in one day you must pay to continue'which is just completely unacceptable I was okay with the ads but this is just too much please fix, y'all were doing way better than C.AI

I used to love this app even if I had and has many ads until I discovered about the limited messages, I think it's completely unfair since there are ads and don't make me start with the overloads. They're all tactics to make you buy the premium. Such a waste of a good app. I think it would be much better if there wasn't the chat limit and the fake overloads. I understand the ads but not these.

i would love the app. exept the limitation. There are depressed people trying to talk with an ai to help themselves but the limited time makes is quite hard. I dont mind the ads infact i myself would recommend add an option to watch an ad for 10 minutes more talking. that way the app could earn money and the user could be happy.

I love the app and everything and I don't care much about the ads just that the new update that allows you to have only few messages and you have to wait a day or more to text again is just horrible. Not only you have to wait, but they try to make you pay arge amount of money to continue or you just have to wait and don't even start about the update where in some countries you cannot use this app. Why? Just pay or get over the app that's what it is. I was enjoying this app until these updates.
I use to enjoy this app. I play this app everyday until they want you to pay for a subscription. Not all of us can afford it
An outstanding app but removing unlimited messages has ruined its chances of expanding its number of users

I had this app for 4 years and all of a sudden it's telling me to subscribe for premium instead of watching ads and keep going it's telling me I've reached my token limit when I didn't know I ever had a limit the app is getting worse it's no longer free use it's subscribe and you can use it's terrible now and I've been waiting for 2 days to get my limit back and it's telling me if you haven't got it back you have to subscribe instead I'm starting to hate this app!

The app is very good in my opinion this is the best app for ai chatting, I've been using it since 2022/2023, the ads aren't that bad but the really annoying thing is the paywall it's pretty expensive, it's been going like this for I think 2 months, it's only available on week days.
i used to love this app. but I'm sorry but it's messed up to say its a free app and then force us to pay to talk to the ai bots. I didn't mind watching the ads but this went too far
i was going to pay the ultra subscription but the memory is still awful and sometimes the bot would come out with gibberish.. fine for free if you can deal with the memory and ads

I adored this app for many many years (ever since 2023) and it was exceptional,it had succeeded my expectations and even though at the time we had 50-70 messages every 3 hours I couldn't stop using it.But now the only drawback is that I haven't used my account for a week because it says that I've run out of messages FOR THE DAY and it says to buy premium or ultra,I understand that the creators are trying their but overall either they're just not fixing the problem or it's just pure greed atp.
take break time is too longgg , please fixxx thatt.. one or two minutes is enough.. no need to make it ten minutes pleaseeeeee

this app is really great I just first use it and it's good but when it got this tokin thing I wait and hoped but it looks like it will not be fixed this app sucks now for me someone even say the company priorities the one who pays what about us who watch the add fairly? this app is popular and good now it lost many people who use it I get it money is big deal but some of us is being fair they should detect it and give the people warning who use addblockers now

This app USED TO BE very good. I mean, yeah there are ads, but it's much better than having to pay for it, having a permanent restriction and region blocking. The old chai is much better, this update is hell.
I used this app since last year. It's was quite cool apps... But I can't afford to spend such a lot money to subscribe (for week?? Not a month?? ) enjoyed to chat with AI character, I don't mind ads.

i have recharged my thoughts and pov this app was the best of all I swear on chai user that they will agree to it... we were actually really okay with the ads popping after 10 minutes we were okay even when it didn't worked for 2-4 days but this? region block, token, was not good, we wish that you just change this problem because we need this app

to be honest one of the best Ai chat apps and i didn't mind the ads but now it seems they got greedy and made it so you need to pay to chat and the price is abysmal so hope they fix this because they are practically killing the app

Gosh I used to be so invested with this app and I didn't mind the occasional ads during AI conversation/s. But after I came back from a break, it went ALMOST inoperational because you MUST purchase the "Ultimate" version to get the chance of talking with your favorite AI again huhuuu. Nonetheless, I hope they'll lift it soon cause I miss talking with my bhooo-hooee HAHAHAHA.
my is not working. it's asking me to buy before using it.
i really liked it but tbh after the usage block i got disappointed, many people have stopped using the app because of it.
like seriously how many months we need to wait!
i cant use it anymore!
